transcript.speaker: Doctor
transcript.text: What brings you in today? Good morning, Doctor. I have been having a headache and pain in my eyes.

transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: Since when we have been experiencing this? It started a

transcript.speaker: Patient
transcript.text: Two days ago. Is the headache constant or does it come and go?

transcript.speaker: Doctor
transcript.text: It's mostly constant but it gets worse when I look at screens.

report_data.diagnosis: Possible Computer Vision Syndrome (CVS) or Migraine, differential diagnoses include Sinusitis or Allergic Rhinitis
report_data.action_plan: Follow-up appointment to assess symptoms and consider further testing or treatment
report_data.risk_indicators: Dust allergy, potential risk of developing CVS or Migraine
report_data.ent_findings: Eye pain, potential for CVS or Migraine
report_data.verification_notes: Patient confirmed experiencing headache and eye pain for 2 days
report_data.doctor_notes: Patient's symptoms may be related to screen use, further evaluation needed to rule out other conditions
